rejected.reason: Anonymous third-party GitHub repo with no editorial authority; not Moonshot AI or any established outlet; excerpt is a compiled paraphrase by an unknown account making extraordinary claims (world's first 3T-level open-source model) with no primary backing.
Personal study compilation (CC BY-NC 4.0) by an anonymous GitHub user; explicitly secondary; no editorial oversight or institutional accountability; original Moonshot sources not captured.
Anonymous personal GitHub README news digest — OpenAI sandbox-escape story. No editorial authority; original OpenAI blog post not captured and unverifiable; zero institutional accountability.

Anonymous personal GitHub README news digest — Pillar Security sandbox vulnerabilities story. Original BleepingComputer article not captured; publisher lacks editorial authority; all details second-hand.
Anonymous personal GitHub README news digest — Cursor hierarchical agent swarms story. Original Cursor blog post not captured; publisher lacks editorial authority; unverifiable paraphrase.
Anonymous personal GitHub README news digest — Hugging Face cyberattack story. Original TechRadar article not captured; single attributed quote cannot be verified; no editorial accountability.
Anonymous personal GitHub README news digest — AWS/Anthropic Claude gateway story. Original AWS ML Blog not captured; publisher lacks editorial authority; all product details second-hand.
Anonymous personal GitHub README news digest — AI agent billing abuse story. Original InfoQ article not captured; specific dollar figures cannot be verified; no editorial accountability.
Anonymous personal GitHub README news digest — AMD Helios rack-scale AI story. Original CNBC article not captured; CNBC's credibility cannot transfer to a zero-authority aggregator paraphrase.

Anonymous personal GitHub README news digest — Google 'Frozen v2' chip story. Original The Information article (paywalled) not captured; source-hedged phrasing ('Sources: Google is developing...') via zero-authority aggregator.

Bitget is a cryptocurrency exchange; its news desk is content aggregation with no original financial journalism credentials or editorial standing — insufficient authority for semiconductor equity earnings reporting.

Excerpt is solely the generic page title with zero guidance figures; the specific 40% full-year growth guidance and $44.6–$45.8B Q3 guidance are entirely absent from the excerpt — substantial extrapolation beyond what the excerpt supports.
ts2.tech is a satellite technology company blog, not a credible financial news source; no authority for Philadelphia Semiconductor Index data; article date estimated rather than confirmed.

Generic evergreen tracker article title with no specific figures; all key FOMC claim details (July 28-29 dates, 3.50-3.75% rate, member counts) absent from excerpt; URL has no date component — specific claim cannot be attributed to this excerpt.

Financial opinion/analysis site; key claim data ($64.1B annual revenue, $26.5B Nasdaq listing) absent from excerpt; 'Must-Own AI Stock?' framing confirms opinion rather than primary financial reporting.
